	- (x^68 + 21*x^67 + 250*x^66 + 2140*x^65 + 14266*x^64 + 75898*x^63 + 328335*x^62 + 1182177*x^61 + 3628645*x^60 + 9683348*x^59 + 22793938*x^58 + 47756225*x^57 + 89350161*x^56 + 148828857*x^55 + 218566835*x^54 + 279888189*x^53 + 321135879*x^52 + 411113573*x^51 + 860317325*x^50 + 2420066009*x^49 + 6312226094*x^48 + 13847463568*x^47 + 25665236518*x^46 + 40960350311*x^45 + 57032571820*x^44 + 69220653755*x^43 + 71124833881*x^42 + 55094049983*x^41 + 13201024675*x^40 - 60904695904*x^39 - 169055877896*x^38 - 305077097561*x^37 - 452482151521*x^36 - 586009488195*x^35 - 678803754618*x^34 - 713358096214*x^33 - 689593321805*x^32 - 623251097790*x^31 - 535384386258*x^30 - 442068057824*x^29 - 351716340014*x^28 - 268197571281*x^27 - 194027692925*x^26 - 131409917941*x^25 - 81926358802*x^24 - 45935224707*x^23 - 22305846330*x^22 - 8671816735*x^21 - 2065025312*x^20 + 359683975*x^19 + 790076876*x^18 + 562985032*x^17 + 285998336*x^16 + 119867128*x^15 + 45278932*x^14 + 16134288*x^13 + 5367080*x^12 + 1644944*x^11 + 456569*x^10 + 112079*x^9 + 23503*x^8 + 3982*x^7 + 491*x^6 + 34*x^5)*y^8
	- (x^67 + 20*x^66 + 230*x^65 + 1790*x^64 + 10151*x^63 + 44647*x^62 + 160936*x^61 + 494183*x^60 + 1329729*x^59 + 3200953*x^58 + 7007281*x^57 + 14152094*x^56 + 26774876*x^55 + 48395989*x^54 + 85889434*x^53 + 154576153*x^52 + 287671528*x^51 + 544484481*x^50 + 998350116*x^49 + 1686025873*x^48 + 2537217729*x^47 + 3338595495*x^46 + 3764812045*x^45 + 3464655697*x^44 + 2174658819*x^43 - 165998908*x^42 - 3312341387*x^41 - 6637368430*x^40 - 9115433273*x^39 - 9429813827*x^38 - 6281817203*x^37 + 1070881969*x^36 + 12182597222*x^35 + 25079471939*x^34 + 36708804607*x^33 + 44265045771*x^32 + 46577313391*x^31 + 44376619695*x^30 + 39318843135*x^29 + 32911567875*x^28 + 26172701346*x^27 + 19749779563*x^26 + 14059058088*x^25 + 9353910283*x^24 + 5743087666*x^23 + 3198171667*x^22 + 1575716011*x^21 + 660188674*x^20 + 217888093*x^19 + 45338152*x^18 - 2186940*x^17 - 6873664*x^16 - 3550624*x^15 - 1329944*x^14 - 469084*x^13 - 154352*x^12 - 46816*x^11 - 12880*x^10 - 3143*x^9 - 658*x^8 - 112*x^7 - 14*x^6 - x^5)*y^7
	- (x^66 + 19*x^65 + 175*x^64 + 1030*x^63 + 4581*x^62 + 16674*x^61 + 52182*x^60 + 144956*x^59 + 365759*x^58 + 853218*x^57 + 1867371*x^56 + 3885009*x^55 + 7777011*x^54 + 15138134*x^53 + 28810982*x^52 + 53251149*x^51 + 93407215*x^50 + 150800362*x^49 + 218978596*x^48 + 283618309*x^47 + 328459156*x^46 + 343347949*x^45 + 331138193*x^44 + 310569146*x^43 + 314470713*x^42 + 382713243*x^41 + 550180533*x^40 + 829997926*x^39 + 1194653477*x^38 + 1561413830*x^37 + 1794797062*x^36 + 1742181063*x^35 + 1309390719*x^34 + 545916640*x^33 - 338806139*x^32 - 1084803242*x^31 - 1537586395*x^30 - 1695208926*x^29 - 1633797807*x^28 - 1436252719*x^27 - 1171470485*x^26 - 891166136*x^25 - 631262655*x^24 - 413663104*x^23 - 248004370*x^22 - 133810723*x^21 - 63427246*x^20 - 25463005*x^19 - 8155708*x^18 - 1863176*x^17 - 230300*x^16)*y^6
	- (x^65 + 10*x^64 + 60*x^63 + 270*x^62 + 1005*x^61 + 3252*x^60 + 9440*x^59 + 25100*x^58 + 62055*x^57 + 144249*x^56 + 317977*x^55 + 668972*x^54 + 1348077*x^53 + 2592704*x^52 + 4674984*x^51 + 7677433*x^50 + 11238494*x^49 + 14681378*x^48 + 17479658*x^47 + 19605843*x^46 + 21677275*x^45 + 24731065*x^44 + 29793103*x^43 + 37270717*x^42 + 46415588*x^41 + 54958189*x^40 + 59201687*x^39 + 54741447*x^38 + 38066436*x^37 + 8942153*x^36 - 27058199*x^35 - 57930734*x^34 - 69714175*x^33 - 56392204*x^32 - 26283706*x^31 + 5154476*x^30 + 28071019*x^29 + 40559772*x^28 + 44081667*x^27 + 41223934*x^26 + 34635297*x^25 + 26560678*x^24 + 18651907*x^23 + 11939233*x^22 + 6884875*x^21 + 3505963*x^20 + 1525566*x^19 + 536843*x^18 + 137249*x^17 + 19600*x^16)*y^5
	+ (x^55 + 26*x^54 + 392*x^53 + 4366*x^52 + 29184*x^51 + 120724*x^50 + 342875*x^49 + 747869*x^48 + 1368357*x^47 + 2209369*x^46 + 3260662*x^45 + 4501534*x^44 + 5913622*x^43 + 7476913*x^42 + 9165218*x^41 + 10922455*x^40 + 12639473*x^39 + 14122204*x^38 + 15080743*x^37 + 15149834*x^36 + 13996081*x^35 + 11553862*x^34 + 8352104*x^33 + 5471929*x^32 + 3719548*x^31 + 2928386*x^30 + 2534980*x^29 + 2258028*x^28 + 1978128*x^27 + 1664789*x^26 + 1329601*x^25 + 1000033*x^24 + 702910*x^23 + 457507*x^22 + 272014*x^21 + 144930*x^20 + 67052*x^19 + 25628*x^18 + 7301*x^17 + 1225*x^16)*y^4
	+ (x^54 + 25*x^53 + 367*x^52 + 2228*x^51 + 7222*x^50 + 15706*x^49 + 27469*x^48 + 40928*x^47 + 54233*x^46 + 64714*x^45 + 69947*x^44 + 67148*x^43 + 54056*x^42 + 28281*x^41 - 11829*x^40 - 67568*x^39 - 138543*x^38 - 222153*x^37 - 311010*x^36 - 390615*x^35 - 435246*x^34 - 415480*x^33 - 333762*x^32 - 243024*x^31 - 180492*x^30 - 136014*x^29 - 103164*x^28 - 77944*x^27 - 58072*x^26 - 42211*x^25 - 29654*x^24 - 19912*x^23 - 12646*x^22 - 7477*x^21 - 4046*x^20 - 1940*x^19 - 792*x^18 - 248*x^17 - 50*x^16)*y^3
	+ (x^53 + 24*x^52 + 112*x^51 + 246*x^50 + 436*x^49 + 639*x^48 + 848*x^47 + 1012*x^46 + 1123*x^45 + 1138*x^44 + 1064*x^43 + 882*x^42 + 630*x^41 + 329*x^40 + 64*x^39 - 88*x^38 + 21*x^37 + 540*x^36 + 1695*x^35 + 3684*x^34 + 5970*x^33 + 6501*x^32 + 5016*x^31 + 3816*x^30 + 2856*x^29 + 2100*x^28 + 1512*x^27 + 1064*x^26 + 728*x^25 + 483*x^24 + 308*x^23 + 188*x^22 + 108*x^21 + 58*x^20 + 28*x^19 + 12*x^18 + 4*x^17 + x^16)*y^2
	+ (x^52 + 2*x^51 + 4*x^50 + 6*x^49 + 9*x^48 + 12*x^47 + 16*x^46 + 20*x^45 + 25*x^44 + 30*x^43 + 36*x^42 + 42*x^41 + 49*x^40 + 56*x^39 + 64*x^38 + 72*x^37 + 81*x^36 + 90*x^35 + 99*x^34 + 69*x^33)*y
	- x^33;
q :=x+1;
t := x*y/(x+1);
E:=[(1+q)*t+(2-q),0,q*t^2+(1-q)*t,0,0];
P:=[-t,t^2];
